Properties.Description: Constructs a reflection and/or transmission BSDF based on a microfacet reflectance model and a Fresnel curve for dielectrics. If reflection scattering is enabled the node may be layered vertically over a base BSDF for the surface beneath the dielectric layer. By chaining multiple <dielectric_bsdf> nodes you can describe a surface with multiple specular lobes. If transmission scattering is enabled the node may be layered over a VDF describing the surface interior to handle absorption and scattering inside the medium, useful for colored glass, turbid water, etc.
